Menu / audio.device-selection

Can Swift packages do audio device selection?

also known as: input device · output device · audio device

not verified yet · confidence 0.25 · as of 0.7.1

  • CoreAudio HAL is a macOS API family; manifest declares macOS only — no source fence though

serves it · confidence 0.90 · as of 0.7.1
